name: Bar-b-q Meatloaf
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup sliced pimento-stuffed green olives, optional
1/2 cup reserved Head Country Bar-B-Q Sauce for topping
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Mix thoroughly until everything is well incorporated.
3. Pat the mixture into a meatloaf pan.
4. Top with Bar-B-Q sauce.
5. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for one hour.
6. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
